violations.text: The establishment does not employ a full-time, on-site manager certified in food safety that is registered with the RIDOH Center for Food Protection. CFSM License Application was printed at the time of inspection. Application is to be submitted as soon as possible. New Violation. Correct By: 05/20/2025

3 Individual Pizzas were observed held at 46 degrees Fahrenheit in the reach-in cooler. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) food must be held at 41 degrees Fahrenheit or below except during preparation, cooking, or cooling. Pizzas were voluntarily disposed of by the PIC at the time of inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 05/20/2025

Several items (deli sandwiches/wraps) prepared same day were observed held in refrigeration for customer selection in closed plastic clamshell containers at 46 to 47degrees Fahrenheit. Prepared food items are to be cooled properly to 41 degrees Fahrenheit or below before being enclosed in the plastic containers and set for customer selection. Food items were moved to the walk-in refrigerator and opened for rapid cooling at the time of inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 05/20/2025

The walls in the 3 bay sink area were observed to have an accumulation of soil residue and debris. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 05/27/2025

Several Calzones in the Small Open Air Cooler were observed held at 42 to 46 degrees Fahrenheit. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) food must be held at 41 degrees Fahrenheit or below except during preparation, cooking, or cooling. Calzones observed at 42 to 44 degrees Fahrenheit were moved to colder zone of refrigeration (away from the shelf edge), and calzones observed at 45 to 46 degrees Fahrenheit were voluntarily disposed of at the time of inspection. PIC to monitor food temperatures in unit. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 08/27/2024

Deli sandwiches and wraps prepared/packaged in the food establishment are lacking proper label information. Food packaged in a food establishment must be labeled with the common name of the food, a list of ingredients, the quantity of the contents, and the business name/address. (Labels were observed to have allergen information, but lacking ingredients information.) New Violation. Correct By: 07/24/2023

The hand-washing sink in the kitchen was blocked by a barrel and crate. A hand-washing sink shall be accessible at all times for employee use. Items blocking sink were moved at the time of inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 06/28/2023

The following cold hold temperatures were observed in an Open Air Cooler Case... - Chicken Tenders were observed held at 45 degrees Fahrenheit - Hamburgers were observed at 44 degrees Fahrenheit - Dessert(s) were observed held at 42 degrees Fahrenheit Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) food must be held at 41 degrees Fahrenheit or below except during preparation, cooking, or cooling. (Chicken Tenders were voluntarily disposed of at the time of inspection and Hamburgers were moved to colder refrigeration at the time of inspection.) Corrected On-Site. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 06/28/2023

Foods that are prepared and packaged in the food establishment are lacking complete ingredients list on the labels. (Ex. Bagels sandwich lists "Bagel", not the complete ingredients list for the bagel.) Food packaged in a food establishment must be labeled with the common name of the food, a list of ingredients, the quantity of the contents, and the business name/address. New Violation. Correct By: 07/12/2023

The walk-in cooler door was observed to be in poor repair/improperly adjusted. The walk-in cooler door was observed to have a gap at the bottom of the handle side of the door not allowing for a tight seal. New Violation. Correct By: 07/31/2023
